PRIVACY_INTRO: This Privacy Policy explains how SpendWise collects, uses, and protects your personal information. By using this application, you agree to the practices described below.
PRIVACY_S1_BODY: We collect the following types of information when you use SpendWise:
PRIVACY_S1_ITEM1: Account information — your name and email address provided via Google Sign-In
PRIVACY_S1_ITEM2: Financial data — expense records, categories, budgets, and income that you enter
PRIVACY_S1_ITEM3: Device information — device type and browser used to access the app
PRIVACY_S1_ITEM4: Reminder notification data — notification and reminder preferences when you enable reminders
PRIVACY_S2_BODY: Your information is used solely to provide and improve the SpendWise service:
PRIVACY_S2_ITEM1: To display and manage your expense and budget records
PRIVACY_S2_ITEM2: To sync your data across devices when you are signed in
PRIVACY_S2_ITEM3: To personalize your experience such as language and currency preferences
PRIVACY_S2_ITEM4: To send expense-entry reminders and developer announcements when notifications are enabled
PRIVACY_S3_BODY: Your data is stored securely using Firebase — Google's cloud platform. We apply industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.
PRIVACY_S3_HIGHLIGHT: All data is encrypted in transit using HTTPS and stored securely in Firebase Realtime Database under your unique user ID.
PRIVACY_S4_BODY: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your data may be processed by:
PRIVACY_S4_ITEM1: Firebase (Google) — for authentication, data storage, and cloud hosting
PRIVACY_S4_ITEM2: Google Sign-In — for secure account authentication only
PRIVACY_S5_BODY: You have full control over your data within SpendWise:
PRIVACY_S5_ITEM1: You can update your display name and profile at any time from the Profile page
PRIVACY_S5_ITEM2: You can delete your expense records, budgets, and categories at any time
PRIVACY_S5_ITEM3: You can permanently delete your account and all associated data from Profile & Settings → Danger Zone
PRIVACY_S5_ITEM4: You can enable or disable reminder notifications at any time from Profile & Settings
PRIVACY_S6_BODY: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or your data, please reach out through our GitHub repository:
NOTI_SECTION_DESC: Control expense reminders for this account.
NOTI_MASTER_DESC: Allow this app to send expense reminder alerts on this device.
NOTI_DAILY_REMINDER_DESC: Send one reminder each day to add your expenses.
NOTI_ENABLE_ERROR: Could not enable reminder notifications. Please try again.
NOTI_DISABLE_ERROR: Could not disable reminder notifications. Please try again.
NOTI_SETTINGS_ERROR: Could not save reminder settings. Please try again.
NOTIFICATION_UNSUPPORTED: This device or browser does not support reminder notifications.
NOTIFICATION_PERMISSION_DENIED: Reminder notification permission was blocked. Please allow notifications from your device or browser settings.
NOTIFICATION_SETTINGS_PERMISSION_DENIED: Reminder settings could not be saved because Firebase Database rules denied this write. Please check the notification_settings and notification_tokens rules.
NOTIFICATION_VAPID_KEY_INVALID: Web notification setup is incomplete. Please replace firebaseVapidKey with the full Web Push certificate public key from Firebase Cloud Messaging settings.
NOTIFICATION_TOKEN_FAILED: Could not create a reminder token. Please try again.
NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_WORKER_INACTIVE: Reminder notification service is still starting. Please refresh the page and try again.
NOTIFICATION_PUSH_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The browser push service is unavailable. In Brave, enable Google services for push messaging or try Chrome, then refresh and enable notifications again.
NOTI_ADMIN_SUBTITLE: Send a custom notification to users who have enabled reminders.
NOTI_ADMIN_SECRET_HELP: This page requires the NOTIFICATION_ADMIN_SECRET value from your deployment environment.
NOTI_ADMIN_TARGET_PLACEHOLDER: Leave empty to send to all.
NOTI_ADMIN_REQUIRED_ERROR: Admin secret, title, and message are required.
